name: Bow-Tie Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup sliced red onion, separated into rings
1/3 cup frozen Florida orange juice concentrate, thawed
1/4 cup sliced pitted ripe olives, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions. Drain; rinse with cold water and drain again.
2. In a large bowl toss together meat strips, citrus sections, and onion.
3. Add pasta and toss gently.
4. For dressing, in a small bowl stir together mayonnaise dressing, thawed orange juice concentrate, and paprika.
5. Pour dressing over salad mixture; toss gently.
6. To serve, line 4 dinner plates with spinach; spoon salad mixture atop spinach. If desired, top with olives.
Makes 4 (2-cup) servings.
